---
name: Specification Question
about: Ask a question about the OpenSignals Protocol specification
title: '[SPEC] '
labels: spec-question, documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Question

Ask your question about the OpenSignals Protocol specification clearly and concisely.

## Context

Provide context about why you're asking this question. What are you trying to accomplish?

## Specification Section

Which part of the specification is your question about?
- [ ] Protocol overview (README.md)
- [ ] Core specification (specs/opensignals-v0.1.md)
- [ ] Terminology (specs/terminology.md)
- [ ] Conformance requirements (specs/conformance.md)
- [ ] JSON schemas (schemas/)
- [ ] Trust scoring model
- [ ] API endpoints
- [ ] Integration patterns (integrations/)
- [ ] Examples (examples/)
- [ ] Not sure / General question

## Relevant Documentation

If you've already reviewed documentation, list what you've read:
- [ ] Main README
- [ ] Protocol specification
- [ ] Integration guides (AdCP, AAMP)
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] Other: _____________

## Specific Section Reference

If your question relates to a specific section, quote or reference it here:

> "Quote from specification or provide section reference"

## What I've Tried

Describe what you've tried so far to find the answer:

1. Searched documentation
2. Reviewed examples
3. Attempted implementation
4. Other: _____________

## Example Scenario

If applicable, provide a concrete scenario that illustrates your question:

```json
{
  "example_scenario": "here"
}
```

## Expected Clarification

What type of clarification are you looking for?
- [ ] Definition of a term or concept
- [ ] How to implement a specific feature
- [ ] How two components interact
- [ ] Best practices or recommendations
- [ ] Edge case handling
- [ ] Validation rules
- [ ] Other: _____________

## Your Interpretation

What is your current understanding or interpretation? (This helps us clarify misconceptions)

## Use Case

What are you trying to build or accomplish with OpenSignals?
- [ ] Implementing signal provider service
- [ ] Building demand-side integration
- [ ] Creating governance system
- [ ] Developing agency tools
- [ ] Academic research
- [ ] Evaluating for adoption
- [ ] Other: _____________

## Impact on Your Work

How is this question blocking or affecting your work?
- [ ] Blocker - Cannot proceed without clarification
- [ ] High - Significantly affects implementation approach
- [ ] Medium - Important for best practices
- [ ] Low - Curiosity or future planning

## Proposed Answer (Optional)

If you have a hypothesis or proposed answer, share it here. This helps us understand your thinking and provide better clarification.

## Would This Be Useful in Documentation?

- [ ] Yes, this should be added to FAQ
- [ ] Yes, this should be clarified in specification
- [ ] Yes, this needs an example
- [ ] No, just need personal clarification

## Related Questions

Are there any related questions or topics?
- #issue_number
- Discussion link

## Additional Context

Add any other context, diagrams, or examples that help explain your question.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and documentation
- [ ] I have provided sufficient context about my question
- [ ] I have referenced relevant specification sections
- [ ] I have described what I've already tried
- [ ] I have explained my use case
